mapper.select:
SELECT comp_idx, comp_name, com_code, type, user_cnt, TO_CHAR(license_sdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS license_sdate, TO_CHAR(license_edate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS license_edate, copyright, use_yn FROM ELIB_COMPANY WHERE use_yn = 'Y'
AND INSTR(type, #{type}) > 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_COMPANY WHERE 1=1
AND INSTR(type, #{type}) > 0

SELECT comp_idx, comp_name, com_code, type, user_cnt, TO_CHAR(license_sdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS license_sdate, TO_CHAR(license_edate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS license_edate, copyright, use_yn FROM ELIB_COMPANY WHERE 1=1
AND INSTR(type, #{type}) > 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_COMPANY WHERE 1=1 AND use_yn = 'Y'
AND INSTR(type, #{type}) > 0

SELECT comp_name, com_code, type, user_cnt, TO_CHAR(license_sdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS license_sdate, TO_CHAR(license_edate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS license_edate, copyright, use_yn FROM ELIB_COMPANY WHERE comp_idx = #{comp_idx}

SELECT comp_idx, comp_name, com_code, type, user_cnt, TO_CHAR(license_sdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS license_sdate, TO_CHAR(license_edate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS license_edate, copyright, use_yn FROM ELIB_COMPANY WHERE 1=1 AND use_yn = 'Y'
AND INSTR(type, #{type}) > 0
SELECT homepage_id, CASE WHEN homepage_code = '9999999' THEN '통합' ELSE homepage_name END AS library_name, SUBSTR(homepage_code, 1, 8) AS library_code FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(comp_idx),0)+1 FROM ELIB_COMPANY
INSERT INTO ELIB_COMPANY ( comp_idx, com_code, comp_name, type, user_cnt, license_sdate, license_edate, copyright, use_yn, add_id, add_date ) VALUES ( #{comp_idx}, #{com_code}, #{comp_name}, #{type}, #{user_cnt}, TO_DATE(#{license_sdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{license_edate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{copyright}, #{use_yn}, #{add_id}, SYSDATE )
